name: place-relationship-flexible-mvp
title: Place 关系图泛化 MVP
description: 把 Place Relationship 从 school_enrollment 专用改为有限枚举的通用关系图；学生-学校保留为一种关系类型/兼容入口。
creator: lijin
notes: 2026-04-27: Generalized Place Relationship so student-school is one relation_type, not the whole relationship model. Added generic POST /api/v1/taverns/{home_id}/relationships, finite relationship types, target-owner approval for non-school targets, owner-only target relationship projections, frontend relationship normalizer/API/UI, and docs/spec updates. Kept /relationships/school-enrollments as compatibility wrapper and kept SchoolMemberSummary as a school_enrollment-only projection. No visitor social/friend/private-message graph was added.

verification: RED: py -3 -m pytest -q backend\tests\test_v1_place_home_mvp.py --tb=short failed with 404 for POST /relationships and relationship type tests before generic API implementation
RED: node .\frontend\scripts\place-home-contract-test.mjs failed because normalizePlaceRelationshipDraft export did not exist
py -3 -m pytest -q --tb=short with HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY removed for localhost page tests => 381 passed, 6 warnings

done: target owner approval for any target place
school member summary remains school_enrollment projection
frontend generic relationship draft normalization and UI copy
not_built: public browsing of complete relationship graph
